title: Persons with Disabilities Concession Card (PWDCC)
text:
Persons with Disabilities Concession Card (PWDCC) - SupportGoWhere
Persons with Disabilities Concession Card (PWDCC)
Share link
Provides persons with disabilities with concessionary rates for travel on public transport.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Discount of up to 55% off adult public transport fares and option to buy monthly pass at $55 per month
Persons with Disabilities Concession Card will be mailed out within 14 working days after SimplyGo receives your application
Apply online via SG Enable website
Collapse all sections
About this support

Discount of up to 55% off for adult public transport fares

Option to purchase Monthly Public Transport Concession Pass at $55 per month for unlimited travel on train and basic bus services

No additional fares for distance beyond 7.2km

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen and Permanent Resident

Aged 7 to below 60 years old

Have a permanent disability based on any one of the following:

Physical Disability: Requires some assistance with at least 1 of the 6 Activities of Daily Living due to physical impairment

A visual impairment: Moderate visual impairment or worse in the better eye 

A hearing impairment: Moderate hearing loss or worse in the better ear 

Intellectual disability

Autism




Proof of disability must be provided using the Disability Verification Form completed by a relevant registered healthcare professional.

How to apply?

Proof of disability must be provided using the Disability Verification Form completed by a relevant registered healthcare professional.




For more information on the application process, please visit Enabling Guide.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SG Enable Hotline: 1800-858-5885

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

contactus@sgenable.sg

Enabling Village
20 Lengkok Bahru
#01-01, Singapore 159053 

Scheme last updated 03 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
